name: the-pass
description: A public research line for trading strategies with bounded native subagents and optional audited Codex/Claude delegation.

interface.shortDescription: A bounded trading research and testing line.
interface.longDescription: The Pass turns trading ideas into structured research, reproducible tests, independent reviews, paper observations, and artifact-backed gate decisions. The public workflow is read-only with respect to markets and cannot approve or place live orders.
defaultPrompt: Run this trading idea through The Pass to its research gate.
Research and formalize this trading hypothesis.
Independently review this package for its next gate.
